articles.title: Melrose man charged with stealing hundreds of thousands from clients, prosecutors say
articles.description:
Investigators say suspended attorney Henry Rappa Jr. kept his client's funds and continued practicing law despite being ordered not to.

The post Melrose man charged with stealing hundreds of thousands from clients, prosecutors say appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Attorney Henry Rappa Jr. charged with stealing over $300,000 from clients.
Rappa continued practicing law despite being suspended and ordered not to.
Local residents may face legal challenges due to Rappa's actions and misconduct.

articles.title: Eugene Mirman posts message after fiery NH crash and dramatic rescue
articles.description:
The comedian thanked rescuers after being pulled from a burning vehicle near a Bedford, New Hampshire, toll plaza.

The post Eugene Mirman posts message after fiery NH crash and dramatic rescue appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Comedian Eugene Mirman was rescued from a burning vehicle in New Hampshire.
Mirman expressed gratitude to rescuers following the incident near Bedford toll plaza.
The dramatic rescue highlights the importance of emergency response in local communities.

articles.title: NH trooper assaulted in unprovoked attack
articles.description:
A Dover, New Hampshire, man is facing a slew of charges following what state police called “wanton, violent assault” on an officer.

The post NH trooper assaulted in unprovoked attack appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Dover man assaulted a New Hampshire state trooper in an unprovoked attack.
The suspect faces multiple charges following the violent incident on April 4, 2026.
Local police emphasize increased safety measures for officers in response to the attack.

articles.title: Crews battle fast-growing wildfire in windy Southern California that’s forced some to evacuate
articles.description:
The Springs Fire broke out around 11 a.m. Friday and by the evening had grown to about 6.5 square miles.

The post Crews battle fast-growing wildfire in windy Southern California that’s forced some to evacuate appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Crews are battling the Springs Fire, which erupted around 11 a.m. on Friday.
The wildfire has rapidly expanded to approximately 6.5 square miles by evening.
Evacuations have been ordered, raising concerns for Boston residents with family in affected areas.

articles.title: US presses search for a missing serviceman as Iran calls on public to find ‘enemy pilot’
articles.description:
The U.S. and Israel had boasted recently that Iran's air defenses were decimated.

The post US presses search for a missing serviceman as Iran calls on public to find ‘enemy pilot’ appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: U.S. intensifies search for missing serviceman amid rising tensions with Iran.
Iranian authorities call on citizens to identify the missing serviceman as an 'enemy pilot.'
Boston residents may face increased security measures due to escalating military tensions.

articles.title: This runner ‘barely finished’ the Boston Marathon last year. Now he’s back to run again.
articles.description:
Bryan Mallett, 24, is running to support Mass General again after losing his second mother to metastatic colorectal cancer.

The post This runner ‘barely finished’ the Boston Marathon last year. Now he’s back to run again. appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Bryan Mallett, 24, returns to run the Boston Marathon for Mass General on April 17, 2023.
He supports the hospital after losing his second mother to cancer.
Mallett's participation raises awareness for metastatic colorectal cancer in the Boston community.
